© Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.

  --match-run-id           Match the collectors used on another run id

  --crawl-archives         Attempts to crawl every archive file encountered when
                           using File Collector.  May dramatically increase run
                           time of the scan.

  --downloadcloud          Download files from thin Cloud Folders (like
                           OneDrive) to check them.

  -a, --all                Enable all collectors

  -c, --certificates       Enable the certificate store collector

  -C, --com                Enable the COM object collector

  -d, --driver             Enable the driver collector

  -l, --logs               Enable the Log collector

  -f, --file-system        Enable the file system collector

  -F, --firewall           Enable the firewall collector

  -k, --keys               Gather information about the cryptographic keys on
                           the system.

  -p, --network-port       Enable the network port collector

  -P, --process            Enable the process information collector

  -r, --registry           Enable the registry collector

  -s, --service            Enable the service collector

  -t, --tpm                Gather information about the TPM

  -u, --user               Enable the user and group account collector

  -w, --wifi               Enable the saved Wifi information collector

  -h, --gather-hashes      Hashes every file when using the File Collector.  May
                           dramatically increase run time of the scan.

  --gatherverboselogs      Gather all levels in the Log collector. (Default:
                           Only gather Error and Warning when possible.)

  --gatherwifipasswords    Gather passwords when gathering wifi networks.

  --overwrite              If the specified runid already exists delete all data
                           from that run before proceeding.

  --runid                  Identifies which run this is.

  --directories            comma separated list of paths to scan with
                           FileSystemCollector

  --skip-directories       comma separated list of paths to skip with
                           FileSystemCollector

  --hives                  comma separated list of hives and subkeys to search.

  --singlethread           Force singlethreaded collectors.

  --databasefilename       (Default: asa.sqlite) Name of output database
                           (default: asa.sqlite)

  --debug                  Show debug logging statements.

  --lowmemoryusage         Lower memory usage in database. (May reduce
                           performance.)

  --quiet                  (Default: false) Decrease logging to Errors

  --shards                 Number of Database Shards to use.

  --verbose                (Default: false) Increase logging verbosity

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.

Asa 2.3.331+569f4d0249
© Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.

  -D, --duration               Duration, in minutes, to run for before
                               automatically terminating.

  -F, --file-system-monitor    Enable the file system monitor. Unless -d is
                               specified will monitor the entire file system.

  -a, --File names only        Don't gather extended information. Overrides any
                               argument to include additional data.

  -h, --gather-hashes          Gather a hash of each file that is modified or
                               created.

  -d, --directories            Comma-separated list of directories to monitor.

  --overwrite                  (Default: false) If the specified runid already
                               exists delete all data from that run before
                               proceeding.

  --runid                      (Default: Timestamp) Identifies which run this
                               is. Monitor output can be combined with collect
                               output, but doesn't need to be compared.

  --filters                    Specify which NotifyFilters to use for file
                               monitoring, comma separated if provided via cli.

  --databasefilename           (Default: asa.sqlite) Name of output database
                               (default: asa.sqlite)

  --debug                      Show debug logging statements.

  --lowmemoryusage             Lower memory usage in database. (May reduce
                               performance.)

  --quiet                      (Default: false) Decrease logging to Errors

  --shards                     Number of Database Shards to use.

  --verbose                    (Default: false) Increase logging verbosity

  --help                       Display this help screen.

  --version                    Display version information.
